$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: TypeScript port. `useDeprecatedTextAlign` not vendored; deprecation chain handles legacy `textAlign`.
Full 3-entry chain ported verbatim (v3 → v1). Imports `migrate-text-align` and `migrate-font-family` from blocks/_shared.
Upstream paragraph transforms preserved; added bidirectional core/verse ↔ artisanpack/verse and accepts artisanpack/paragraph.

knownDivergences: _shared/migrate-font-family.ts inlines a self-contained `cleanEmptyObject` rather than depending on @wordpress/block-editor's privateApis-gated helper.
